mapper.sql: customs_code, customs_type, host, port, username, password, virtual_host, queue_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_config WHERE customs_code = #{customsCode} AND customs_type = #{customsType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_config (customs_code, customs_type, host, port, username, password, virtual_host, queue_name) VALUES (#{customsCode}, #{customsType}, #{host}, #{port}, #{username}, #{password}, #{virtualHost}, #{queueName})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_config WHERE customs_code = #{customsCode} AND customs_type = #{customsType}
